list.name: Changes
list.comment: Enhanced satellite constellation modeling and selection logic: implemented Walker delta constellation support, integrated anchor grid-based visibility and quality computations, and added elevation-based ranking and selection optimization for both real and synthetic satellites.

component.name: FlaskConsoleOptions

option.name: myCustomStartScript

task.summary: Default task
Refactor clustering evaluation function and move `build_users_container` to `usergen.py`.
Refactor `weighted_kmeans` logic and move `summarize` and `print_summary` to `helper.py`.
Refactor `pipeline.py` to modularize scenario execution logic and introduce `run_scenario`. Streamline `main.py` for parallel processing and CSV export. Add sweep helper utilities to `helper.py`.
Refactor configuration system to introduce grouped blocks for modularity. Update all modules to use the new config structure with hierarchical access patterns.
Refactor `pipeline.py` to add load-balance refinement logic and enhance configuration printing. Update related modules for expanded config capabilities and hierarchical access structure.

Refactor `pipeline.py` to incorporate profiling via `Profiler` and optimize `split_to_feasible` with a queue-based approach. Enhance `main.py` with progress tracking and expand user scaling list. Update helper and config for detailed metric outputs.
Refactor `refine_load_balance.py` to integrate enhanced load-balancing refinement logic with performance optimizations and add `profiling.py` for timing and count tracking utilities.
Add sweep phase A CSV files for low demand and parallel scenarios in `post_analysis` directory.
Update median demand bandwidth in TrafficConfig from 0.005 to 5 Mbps for accurate QoS modeling.
Refactor user and satellite models for improved geometry handling and add new multi-satellite configuration options. Introduce CSV loading and plotting utilities for scenario analysis.
Add `.gitignore` to exclude generated plots and IDE-specific files

Refactor evaluator logic for consistent beam geometry handling, add radius mode override, and update main plotting setup to include phases A and B. Optimize `refine_load_balance.py` by removing redundant helpers and shifting to grid-based adjacency for overlap refinement.

Revamp README for enhanced clarity and detail: rename project, add feature breakdown, architecture overview, installation steps, usage examples, advanced configurations, and comprehensive module documentation.

Refactor `pipeline.py` for compatibility with the new satellites API: replace `select_top_n_active_sats` with `sort_active_sats`, remove `_get_multisat_cfg` wrapper, and update satellite selection logic for multi-anchor support. Adjust comments and verbose outputs for clarity. Update Phase-B table values in `phaseB_tables.txt`.

Refactor load balancing and evaluation logic for unweighted demand: replace weighted demand with physical traffic-based calculations in `evaluator.py` and `refine_load_balance.py`. Update QoS demand multipliers in `config.py` and Phase-B table paths in `plots`.

Refactor evaluator and pipeline logic: enforce contract for `R_m` overrides, add payload feasibility checks, and streamline satellite selection/association in `pipeline.py`. Remove redundant comments and improve helper functions for compatibility with multi-satellite scenarios.

Refactor evaluator and pipeline logic: add checks for per-satellite time and beam caps, enhance payload feasibility metrics, and optimize repair operator for cluster-level offloads. Update helper functions and `sweep_plots.py` to handle payload masking, infeasibility filtering, and enhanced aggregation.

Refactor load balancing and feasibility logic: update `refine_load_balance.py` to incorporate payload slots multiplier for receiver utilization calculations and enforce updated `receiver_u_max`. Adjust QoS lane multiplier (`J_lanes`) in `config.py` and modify associated test data in `sweep_phaseA.csv`.

Refactor beam model logic: replace `radius_modes_km` with fixed-angle `theta_3db_deg` beamwidth. Update evaluator and baseline functions to derive footprint radius based on beam angle and slant range. Adjust related config and helper functions for compatibility.

Remove deprecated Phase-B tables, update satellite selection to maintain fallbacks for all visible satellites, and add radius-based stats and NaN initialization to metrics pipeline. Replace static user counts for better scaling in phase B sweeps.
Add Phase-B sweep datapoints and tables: generate `phaseB_tables.txt` for plot data, update pipeline logic for scaling sweeps, and add NaN-initialized metrics to handle infeasibility scenarios.
Increase MILP time limit and add sensitivity analysis scripts and data

Enhanced satellite constellation modeling and selection logic: implemented Walker delta constellation support, integrated anchor grid-based visibility and quality computations, and added elevation-based ranking and selection optimization for both real and synthetic satellites.

MESSAGE.value: Refactor `weighted_kmeans` logic and move `summarize` and `print_summary` to `helper.py`.
Refactor `pipeline.py` to modularize scenario execution logic and introduce `run_scenario`. Streamline `main.py` for parallel processing and CSV export. Add sweep helper utilities to `helper.py`.
Refactor configuration system to introduce grouped blocks for modularity. Update all modules to use the new config structure with hierarchical access patterns.
Refactor `pipeline.py` to add load-balance refinement logic and enhance configuration printing. Update related modules for expanded config capabilities and hierarchical access structure.

Refactor `pipeline.py` to incorporate profiling via `Profiler` and optimize `split_to_feasible` with a queue-based approach. Enhance `main.py` with progress tracking and expand user scaling list. Update helper and config for detailed metric outputs.
Refactor `refine_load_balance.py` to integrate enhanced load-balancing refinement logic with performance optimizations and add `profiling.py` for timing and count tracking utilities.
Add sweep phase A CSV files for low demand and parallel scenarios in `post_analysis` directory.
Update median demand bandwidth in TrafficConfig from 0.005 to 5 Mbps for accurate QoS modeling.
Refactor user and satellite models for enhanced geometry handling and add multi-satellite configuration support. Introduce new plotting utilities for sweep analysis.
Refactor user and satellite models for improved geometry handling and add new multi-satellite configuration options. Introduce CSV loading and plotting utilities for scenario analysis.
Add `.gitignore` to exclude generated plots and IDE-specific files

Refactor evaluator logic for consistent beam geometry handling, add radius mode override, and update main plotting setup to include phases A and B. Optimize `refine_load_balance.py` by removing redundant helpers and shifting to grid-based adjacency for overlap refinement.

Revamp README for enhanced clarity and detail: rename project, add feature breakdown, architecture overview, installation steps, usage examples, advanced configurations, and comprehensive module documentation.

Add functionality to write Phase-B plot datapoints to a text file: implement unique user count extraction, format tables, and handle runtime metrics. Enhance sweep_plots.py with new helper functions for data processing and output.

Refactor `pipeline.py` for compatibility with the new satellites API: replace `select_top_n_active_sats` with `sort_active_sats`, remove `_get_multisat_cfg` wrapper, and update satellite selection logic for multi-anchor support. Adjust comments and verbose outputs for clarity. Update Phase-B table values in `phaseB_tables.txt`.

Refactor load balancing and evaluation logic for unweighted demand: replace weighted demand with physical traffic-based calculations in `evaluator.py` and `refine_load_balance.py`. Update QoS demand multipliers in `config.py` and Phase-B table paths in `plots`.

Refactor evaluator and pipeline logic: enforce contract for `R_m` overrides, add payload feasibility checks, and streamline satellite selection/association in `pipeline.py`. Remove redundant comments and improve helper functions for compatibility with multi-satellite scenarios.

Refactor evaluator and pipeline logic: add checks for per-satellite time and beam caps, enhance payload feasibility metrics, and optimize repair operator for cluster-level offloads. Update helper functions and `sweep_plots.py` to handle payload masking, infeasibility filtering, and enhanced aggregation.

Refactor load balancing and feasibility logic: update `refine_load_balance.py` to incorporate payload slots multiplier for receiver utilization calculations and enforce updated `receiver_u_max`. Adjust QoS lane multiplier (`J_lanes`) in `config.py` and modify associated test data in `sweep_phaseA.csv`.

Refactor beam model: replace fixed radius modes with half-power beamwidth angle (theta_3db) for footprint calculation, update evaluator and baselines to derive radius dynamically, and adjust pipeline configurations and helper functions accordingly.

Refactor beam model logic: replace `radius_modes_km` with fixed-angle `theta_3db_deg` beamwidth. Update evaluator and baseline functions to derive footprint radius based on beam angle and slant range. Adjust related config and helper functions for compatibility.

Remove deprecated Phase-B tables, update satellite selection to maintain fallbacks for all visible satellites, and add radius-based stats and NaN initialization to metrics pipeline. Replace static user counts for better scaling in phase B sweeps.
Add Phase-B sweep datapoints and tables: generate `phaseB_tables.txt` for plot data, update pipeline logic for scaling sweeps, and add NaN-initialized metrics to handle infeasibility scenarios.
Increase MILP time limit and add sensitivity analysis scripts and data

Enhanced satellite constellation modeling and selection logic: implemented Walker delta constellation support, integrated anchor grid-based visibility and quality computations, and added elevation-based ranking and selection optimization for both real and synthetic satellites.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Enhanced satellite constellation modeling and selection logic: implemented Walker delta constellation support, integrated anchor grid-based visibility and quality computations, and added elevation-based ranking and selection optimization for both real and synthetic satellites.
